title: Process of Framing in the Data Link Layer
description: A flowchart illustrating how a network layer packet is encapsulated into a frame by the sender and decapsulated by the receiver, highlighting the key components added and removed during the process.
relationships: Encapsulates packet with header/trailer to create frame
Receives bits and passes to data link layer
Extracts and forwards packet to network layer
Verifies data integrity using Frame Check Sequence (FCS)
